actions.name: 厂商名称_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 厂商名称_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 社会统一信用代码
fields.output: 潜在工厂.税务登记证号

actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.sid,
       newcwcs.company_name,
       newcwcs.bank,
       newcwcs.zh,
       newcwcs.shui
FROM newcwcs 
ORDER BY newcwcs.sid ASC

actions.name: 开票工厂_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 开票工厂_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.sid,
       newcwcs.company_name,
       newcwcs.bank,
       newcwcs.zh,
       newcwcs.shui
FROM newcwcs 
ORDER BY newcwcs.sid ASC

actions.name: 负面查看_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 负面查看_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT giftreportingsheet1.sid,
       giftreportingsheet1.ctime,
       giftreportingsheet1.xmlb,
       giftreportingsheet1.CooperationYear,
       giftreportingsheet1.OrderProperties,
       giftreportingsheet1.Com,
       giftreportingsheet1.Dep,
       giftreportingsheet1.IsContinue,
       giftreportingsheet1.ContinueReason,
       giftreportingsheet1.Problem
FROM giftreportingsheet1 
WHERE (giftreportingsheet1.cs_id=[潜在工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY giftreportingsheet1.sid ASC

actions.name: 收礼查看_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 收礼查看_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT giftreportingsheet2.sid,
       giftreportingsheet2.GiftName,
       giftreportingsheet2.Money,
       giftreportingsheet2.Disposal,
       giftreportingsheet2.A0101,
       giftreportingsheet2.A0100,
       giftreportingsheet2.e0122,
       giftreportingsheet2.H01T0,
       giftreportingsheet2.xmlb,
       giftreportingsheet2.ctime
FROM giftreporting,giftreportingsheet2 
WHERE (giftreportingsheet2.cs_id=[潜在工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY giftreportingsheet2.sid ASC

actions.name: 回访查看_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 回访查看_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT giftreportingsheet.sid,
       giftreportingsheet.xmlb,
       giftreportingsheet.visitDate,
       giftreportingsheet.visitPerson,
       giftreportingsheet.IsVisit,
       giftreportingsheet.Content
FROM giftreportingsheet 
WHERE (giftreportingsheet.cs_id=[潜在工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY giftreportingsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 工厂核查
actions.caption: 工厂核查
actions.expression:
SELECT exceptioncheck.sid 
FROM exceptioncheck 
WHERE (exceptioncheck.cs_id=[潜在工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY exceptioncheck.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-外箱体积
actions.caption: 计算-外箱体积
actions.expression: [潜在工厂.工厂产品.外箱长度]*[潜在工厂.工厂产品.外箱宽度]*[潜在工厂.工厂产品.外箱高度]/1000000
actions.output: 潜在工厂.工厂产品.外箱体积

actions.name: 事_申请人员_业务部门
actions.caption: 事_申请人员_业务部门
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[潜在工厂.申请人员]) LIMIT 1

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算条件")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算详细")

view.title:
可否开票填可以则有开票要求不可以则无
  定 金(万)（？--默认为0则不显示在结算方式,填充为数字）
（付款比例%--默认是100% ，0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（结算条件--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（结算详细--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（余款比例%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（余款见票%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充一般为数字）
（注：结算详细只能在下拉中选）
